product: OIDC federation for Databricks-to-open Delta Sharing is generally available
tagline: Using Open ID Connect (OIDC) federation for Delta Sharing, where recipients use JSON web tokens (JWT) from their own IdP as short lived OAuth tokens for secure, federated authentication, is…
what_it_does: Using Open ID Connect (OIDC) federation for Delta Sharing, where recipients use JSON web tokens (JWT) from their own IdP as short lived OAuth tokens for secure, federated authentication, is generally available. This page explains how data providers in Databricks can federate authentication to an identity provider (IdP) to govern access to OpenSharing shares created in Databricks. This authentication flow uses OIDC federation, allowing JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) issued by the recipient's IdP as short lived OAuth tokens authenticated by Databricks.
why_it_matters: This page explains how data providers in Databricks can federate authentication to an identity provider (IdP) to govern access to OpenSharing shares created in Databricks.
